purpose: Machine-readable capability maturity registry for local models, providers, CLIs, SDKs, media tools, and external APIs. This registry guides orchestration but does not replace evidence.

approval.reason: Explain whether this can run locally or needs explicit user approval.

budget.notes: For external APIs, record the approved call/count/cost limit.

capabilities.next_step: Describe the shortest next step toward real execution or workflow integration.
capabilities.expires_when: Describe when this evidence or status must be refreshed.

variants.notes: Use variants when one provider has materially different modes such as CPU/GPU, sync/async, reference-input/no-reference, batch/single, local/cloud, or short/long input.
